name: @bc-grid/core
description: Core types and contracts for bc-grid
author: John Cottrell <john@cot.dev>

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/range.ts src/selection.ts --format esm --dts --sourcemap --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/range.ts src/selection.ts --format esm --dts --sourcemap --watch --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
